checks.detail: payload uses repository-relative paths and source IDs only

purpose: Freeze N22 susceptibility-update schemas, ladders, source-current admissibility, durability metrics, AP dependency rules, active reinforcement controls, and claim boundary before positive probes.

allowed_delta_fields.constraint: only declared source-current fields may change as delta evidence

artifact_manifest.constraint: all row artifacts must be listed with role and digest

delta_persistence_ratio.constraint: must meet declared floor before use

delta_threshold_or_rule.constraint: must be declared before outcome inspection

historical_interaction_provenance_presen.constraint: required when prior interaction is claimed

n20_source_downstream_consumption_status.constraint: records inherited N20 status, not N22 iteration status

peer_same_budget_comparison_scope_reason.constraint: required when peer comparison is not_applicable; only non_route_conditioned_SU2_only may bypass peer comparison

reinforcement_schedule_not_used_as_evide.constraint: false blocks source-current durable geometry claim

route_or_region_conditioned.constraint: determines whether peer comparison is mandatory

row_decision.constraint: partial, blocked, rejected, and not_applicable block support

same_basin_continuation_rule.source: N22 I1 frozen N20 I5 same-basin rule

same_basin_invariant_fields.constraint: must remain stable enough for same-basin continuation

source_contract_row_digest.constraint: must match N22 I1 contract digest

source_current_inputs.constraint: must be runtime/replay emitted, not report-built

susceptibility_update_claim_allowed.constraint: true only when artifacts, thresholds, same-basin rule, replay, controls, AP dependencies, durability, peer comparison, and unsafe flags all pass

primitive_schema_rows.claim_ceiling: source contract input only; no N22 susceptibility-update evidence, semantic learning, choice, agency, native support, Phase 8, sentience, or ant-ecology implementation

same_basin_continuation_rule.allowed_drift: durable geometry delta must remain within declared route or region boundary
same_basin_continuation_rule.boundary_integrity_floor: route or region boundary remains auditable after update
failure_modes: route label changed without geometry change
AP4 gap omitted when base route-conditioned susceptibility participates
AP5 gap omitted when proxy-conditioned susceptibility participates
same_basin_continuation_rule.flux_balance_bounds: durable delta cannot be a one-window flux transient
same_basin_continuation_rule.replay_requirement: later replay preserves susceptibility delta without producer reinforcement
same_basin_continuation_rule.required_coherence_floor: altered geometry stays above coherence floor
same_basin_continuation_rule.required_support_floor: altered geometry stays above support floor

support_scaffold.hidden_support_blocker: fail closed if support or scaffold is preserved by an undeclared producer surface
support_scaffold.producer_role: producer may declare, schedule, or expose the support/scaffold surface, but producer support cannot count as native support

allowed_sources: artifact-only replay from declared run artifacts
snapshot/load replay from declared run artifacts
duplicate replay from declared run artifacts
source_current_definition.definition: emitted by the LGRC runtime or replay from declared run artifacts, not invented by a report builder, label, post-hoc parser, producer-only reinforcement policy, or semantic learning vocabulary
